title: isodon tenuifolius
intro: Isodon tenuifolius, also known as Chinese isodon or small-leaf isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isodon tenuifolius include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and promoting digestion. Isodon tenuifolius can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
